title: COMMUNITY COUNSELING CLINIC - 211info
text: PORTLAND STATE UNIVERSITY COMMUNITY COUNSELING CLINIC COMMUNITY COUNSELING CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, relationship, and family counseling. Sessions are available in-person and by telehealth. 1810 SW 5th Avenue Suite 240 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -School year: Monday-Friday by appointment -Summer hours: June-August times vary. The clinic is closed mid-August to the last week in September. Email (503) 725-4620 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 725-4620 Community Counseling Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for intake and scheduling. Include a phone number in emails and phone messages for a call back. Allow up to 3 business days for clinic staff to return calls. FEES: $20 per session. Reduced fees available in cases of financial hardship. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8:30pm by appointment during the school year. June to September, call for summer hours. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND STATE UNIVERSITY COMMUNITY COUNSELING CLINIC
